top3.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS total_return_quantity,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales_price,
    SUM(cr_return_quantity) / SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS return_rate
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN catalog_returns ON cs_item_sk = cr_item_sk AND cs_order_number = cr_order_number
    JOIN item ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 2000
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc
ORDER BY 
    retu...

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN cr_return_quantity IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS return_rate
FROM 
    catalog_sales cs
    JOIN catalog_returns cr ON cs.cs_order_number = cr.cr_order_number AND cs.cs_item_sk = cr.cr_item_sk
    JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id
ORDER BY 
    return_rate DESC
LIMIT 100

    d.d_year = 2000

ORDER BY 
    return_rate DESC
LIMIT 100
